title: Katthi Parvakkari Lyrics Aranmanai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Katthi Parvakkari
Singer(s): Karthik, Surmukhi
Movie: Aranmanai
Music: Bharadwaj

Kathi paarva kaari
un kannu rendum oosi
kuththi kuththi enna nee kolladhey..

Sondha oora pakka
nee vandhurukka mama
un kaiya vachu enna nee killadhey..

ada amaa amaa amaa
nee sonna ellam right uh..
thank u thank u oh my love
thank u thank u oh my love

Kannukettum dhooram ellam
eththana eththana sandhosam...
oh..kannuku ettum dhooram ellam
eththana eththana sandhosam...
kolusu katti odum nadhi
 padudhadi kuyilattam..

A/C kaathu illatiyum
vepangathu sorgam thaan..
pizza burger illatiyum
sola koottu taste uh than..

ada ama ama ama
nee sonna ellam right uh..
thank u thank u oh my love
thank u thank u oh my love

Moochu vangum kaaththukulla
vandhu veesum poo vasam.
Pondhu kootil manjal maina
enna paththu thalaiyaattum

thatha paatti sonna kadhai
ellam namma nenjoda..
oora vittu ponalum thaan
usuru intha mannoda..

aandu nooru aana pinnum
sondha manna mithicha
sorgam vera edhu irukku....

ada ama ama ama
nee sonna ellam right uh..
thank u thank u oh my love....
thank u thank u oh my love....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Katthi Parvakkari?

The song is a lively and romantic duet that captures the essence of love and celebration.

Who composed the music for Aranmanai?

The music for Aranmanai was composed by Bharadwaj.

Who are the singers of Katthi Parvakkari?

The song is sung by Surmukhi and Karthik.

When was Aranmanai released?

The movie Aranmanai was released in 2014.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is set in a festive and celebratory context, enhancing the joyful atmosphere of the film.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Katthi Parvakkari from the movie Aranmanai is a vibrant and romantic duet that brings a sense of joy and celebration. Sung by Surmukhi and Karthik, the track is composed by Bharadwaj, offering a lively and upbeat melody. The lyrics convey playful romance and gratitude, fitting perfectly within the festive scenes of the film. This song captures the essence of love and happiness, making it ideal for weddings and parties.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Katthi Parvakkari from the movie Aranmanai, where Surmukhi's enchanting vocals meet Bharadwaj's lively composition. This peppy duet is a perfect blend of romance and celebration, making it a must-listen for any festive occasion. Dive into the colorful world of Aranmanai with this captivating track that promises to uplift your spirits.
stanzaMeanings: Knife-eyed girl, your eyes are like needles, don't hurt me.
You've come to see your hometown, uncle, don't hurt me with your hands.
Yes, yes, yes, everything you say is right. Thank you, thank you, oh my love, thank you, thank you, oh my love.
Even if it's far away, there's so much happiness. Oh, even if it's far away, there's so much happiness. The anklet-wearing river sings like a cuckoo.
Even without A/C, the hot air feels like heaven. Even without pizza and burgers, the simple food tastes good.
Our hearts are tied up but fly happily, there's so much beauty.
Yes, yes, yes, everything you say is right. Thank you, thank you, oh my love, thank you, thank you, oh my love.
The fragrance of flowers comes with the breeze. The yellow myna in the cage nods its head.
The stories told by grandparents stay in our hearts. Even if we leave the town, our life is with this land.
Even after a hundred years, walking on our own land feels like heaven, what else is there?
Yes, yes, yes, everything you say is right. Thank you, thank you, oh my love, thank you, thank you, oh my love.
